strategy.name: Dynamic RSI Range + ADX Gateway
strategy.description: BTCUSDT dynamic-band RSI strategy with ADX gating and a bearish-DMI-confirmed protective lower-band flush while already long.

equity.label: Equity
equity.title: Strategy Equity
equity.description: Continuous gateway-run equity curve over the displayed backtest window.

drawdown.label: Drawdown
drawdown.title: Underwater Curve
drawdown.description: Peak-to-trough drawdown from the same continuous gateway run.

btc_price.label: BTC Price
btc_price.title: BTC Underlying Price
btc_price.description: Underlying BTCUSDT price path aligned to the same continuous backtest window.

equity_vs_btc.label: Equity vs BTC
equity_vs_btc.title: Rebased Equity vs BTC
equity_vs_btc.description: Strategy equity and BTC price rebased to the same starting value. This view highlights whether the system adds value beyond passive BTC exposure rather than simply tracking the market.

yearly_returns.label: Yearly Returns
yearly_returns.title: Calendar-Year Returns
yearly_returns.description: Calendar-year return breakdown for the displayed span. Asterisk labels indicate partial-year coverage.

rolling_sharpe.label: Rolling Sharpe
rolling_sharpe.title: Rolling Sharpe
rolling_sharpe.description: 90-day rolling Sharpe computed from daily equity changes over the displayed span.

trade_pnl.label: Trade PnL
trade_pnl.title: Realized Trade PnL
trade_pnl.description: Chronological realized PnL per closed trade from the same continuous gateway run.

exposure.label: Exposure
exposure.title: Gross Exposure
exposure.description: Portfolio exposure over the same continuous gateway run.

notes: Charts on this page use a direct continuous gateway backtest run, not a stitched showcase aggregate.
Old-vs-new family interpretation is documented in the linked research notes and is not plotted as a comparison chart here.
Simulated execution only. No live runtime or API dependency.
